mapper.select: SELECT bi.basket_item_id, bi.basket_id, bi.product_id, bi.quantity, b.basket_id AS basket_basketId, b.user_id AS basket_userId, b.created_at AS basket_createdAt, b.updated_at AS basket_updatedAt, p.product_id AS product_productId, p.name AS product_name, p.price AS product_price, p.stock AS product_stock, p.category AS product_category FROM basket_items bi LEFT JOIN baskets b ON bi.basket_id = b.basket_id LEFT JOIN products p ON bi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE bi.basket_item_id = #{basketItemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO basket_items (basket_id, product_id, quantity) VALUES (#{basketId}, #{productId}, #{quantity})
